task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify graph construction code related to missing private helper nodes.

issue.title: Graph overview hides underscore-prefixed helper functions
issue.body: The graph contains public functions but drops private helper functions, so edges into private build helpers disappear from the overview. The parser output still contains those symbols.

comments.body: This is not a parser extraction problem; it happens when the dependency graph is assembled.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: search_repo_text
tools.description: Search code text for symptoms and output strings.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
